testcase.name: verifyProductSearch

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: (//div[@class='_4rR01T'])[1]' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
